qa_pairs.question: How can I get an overview of all my jobs in the queue?
qa_pairs.answer: You can get an overview of all your jobs in the queue by using the job monitoring interface.

qa_pairs.question: How do I access the job monitoring interface in Open OnDemand?
qa_pairs.answer: To access the job monitoring interface, navigate to the 'Jobs' tab and select 'Active Jobs'.

qa_pairs.question: How can I filter jobs in the job monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: You can filter the jobs by using the 'Filter' text box at the top right of the job monitoring interface.

qa_pairs.question: Can I sort the jobs displayed in the monitoring interface?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, columns can be sorted by clicking on the column headers, for example, you can sort by job status (running, completed, failed, etc.).

qa_pairs.question: What information can I see when I click on a job in the 'Active Jobs' view?
qa_pairs.answer: Clicking on '>' to the left of a job will show you more details about the job, such as the start/end time, node list, and account charged.

qa_pairs.question: How can I view all jobs in the queue, not just active ones?
qa_pairs.answer: You can show all jobs in the queue by clicking on the drop-down menu at the top right of the 'Active Jobs' page and selecting 'All Jobs'.
